title: Jester damages attacking creature when killed in battle

card.rawText: If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the attacking creature. If the card "Bomb" is on the field when this card is killed in battle, send "Bomb" to the cemetery.

plan.title: Jester damages attacking creature when killed in battle
plan.summary: Have the opponent attack and kill Jester in battle, then verify Jester inflicts 10 damage to the attacking creature.

notes: Rules text: if Jester is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the attacking creature.
Set Jester as player_1 primary creature.
Set a deterministic lethal attacker as player_2 primary creature.

steps: Resolve lethal battle damage to Jester.
Verify Jester's death trigger damages the attacking creature.
manualVerification: Confirm Jester only damages the attacking creature when Jester is killed in battle.
riskNotes: This fixture uses a synthetic high-damage attacker so the expected-success route remains lethal even with low damage dice.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
